name: essay-ru
description: Generic Russian profile, the public default for Russian prose. Anchor = Ильяхов «Пиши, сокращай» + Нора Галь «Слово живое и мёртвое» (инфостиль / анти-канцелярит), NOT Stephen King (English-prose craft). Runs the script-agnostic rhythm + markdown-format tells (CV/burstiness, closing-nugget, bold/italic, em-dash) plus the 5 RU vocab tells. English-phrase-anchored tells (banned-vocab, hedge, tricolon-with-'and', King) are deliberately NOT listed: they do not apply to Russian. Carries NO per-author calibration: r-uniform-polish burstiness and em-dash density use the registry's generic defaults rather than any individual writer's fingerprint. Clone this and tune params to calibrate to a specific Russian voice. The RU vocab tells are MEDIUM (precision-biased), so the effective gate is r-uniform-polish + the ear.
